patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (Patient ID 104) with documented mixed dyslipidemia and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus, essential hypertension, and history of anemia (postoperative and unspecified). Recent notable laboratory abnormalities include Ferritin 266.8 (H) and iron studies with Iron 41 (L) and Iron Saturation 15 (L) (07/03/2023), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) (07/03/2023), and triglycerides 158 (H) (07/03/2023). A colonoscopy with biopsy was scheduled/performed 02/21/2025 (COLONOSCOPY, WITH BIOPSY). Multiple care team providers are listed, including Hand Hoyet A, MD (PCP) and several specialists. Documented PHQ scores are low (PHQ-9 0 on 03/28/2023; PHQ-9 3 on 11/17/2020). Demographic and social history entries contain conflicting details (see conflicts). Sources: Singing River Health System and Piedmont Healthcare records.
